title: Screen reader announcement component for accessibility
purpose: Provides a screen reader-only live region that announces messages to assistive technology with configurable politeness level.
module_context: Exports a functional React component named LiveRegion that accepts a message string and optional politeness level, and renders a hidden div with aria-live attributes.

steps.content: Accept a message string and optional level prop with default value 'polite'.
Render a div element with screen reader only styling.
Set the aria-live attribute to the provided level value.
Set the aria-atomic attribute to true for complete message announcement.
Display the provided message content inside the live region.
